text:
against the accused if she felt that the sexual relations were under 
duress or were being established under a false assurance of 
marriage. On many occasions, she even portrayed herself to be 
the wife of the appellant thereby, dispelling the allegation that the 
intention of the appellant was to cheat her right from the inception of 
the relationship. We cannot remain oblivious to the fact that it was 
mostly the complainant who used to travel to meet the appellant at 
his place of posting. Therefore, we are convinced that the relationship 
between the complainant and appellant was consensual without the 
existence of any element of deceit or misconception.
31. Further, the application filed by the complainant at One Stop Center, 
Lalitpur on 23rd March, 2022, makes it abundantly clear that she
